title: Guns at Batasi
writer: Robert Holles, Leo Marks, Marshall Pugh
actors: Richard Attenborough, Jack Hawkins, Flora Robson
plot: Anachronistic strict Regimental Sergeant Major Lauderdale (Sir Richard Attenborough), on a remote colonial African army caught in a local coup d'etat, must use his experience to defend those in his care.
awards: Won 1 BAFTA Award2 wins & 2 nominations total
